---
title: "About"
---

![](images/nemo.png){width="45"} Like Nemo, I'm on a journey. Driven by curiosity, guided by data. Always swimming forward.

**Nguyen Kim Hau**

-   📧 [kh.nguyen.2025\@mitb.smu.edu.sg](mailto:kh.nguyen.2025@mitb.smu.edu.sg) \
    or [haukimng\@gmail.com](mailto:haukimng@gmail.com)
-   💼 [linkedin.com/in/haukim](https://www.linkedin.com/in/haukim)
-   🌐 [haukim.vercel.app](https://haukim.vercel.app)
